subsection: Introduction or enhancement to digital services
title: Notification Prior to Digital Services Changes
verbatim: A financial institution must notify the Bank in accordance with the requirements in paragraphs 16.2 to 16.7 prior to introducing new digital services or enhancement to existing digital services.
translation: Before introducing any new digital service or enhancing an existing one, you must notify BNM in advance following the requirements set out in paragraphs 16.2 through 16.7.
evidence: Digital services notification procedure
Records of notifications submitted to BNM for new or enhanced digital services
Internal approval workflow for digital service launches
Tracking register of all digital service notifications

artifacts.name: Digital Services Notification Procedure
artifacts.description: Procedure for notifying BNM prior to introducing or enhancing digital services

artifacts.name: Digital Services Notification Register
artifacts.description: Register tracking all digital service notifications submitted to BNM

artifacts.name: BNM Notification Submissions
artifacts.description: Copies of notifications submitted to BNM for new or enhanced digital services

subsection: Introduction or enhancement to digital services
title: First-Time Digital Services Notification
translation: When offering digital services for the first time, you must complete the measures in paragraph 16.4 and submit a notification to BNM that includes: a risk assessment with accountabilities, policies, and controls; security arrangements; significant terms and conditions; a client charter; a privacy policy statement; and details of any outsourcing, website links, alliances, or third-party partnerships.
evidence: Risk assessment covering identified risks, accountabilities, policies, and controls
Security arrangements and controls documentation for the digital service
Significant terms and conditions for the digital service
Client charter and privacy policy statement
Outsourcing and third-party partnership details submitted to BNM

artifacts.name: Digital Services Risk Assessment
artifacts.description: Comprehensive risk assessment for first-time digital services including risk strategies, accountabilities, and controls

artifacts.name: Security Arrangements Documentation
artifacts.description: Documentation of security arrangements and controls for the digital service

artifacts.name: Client Charter and Privacy Policy
artifacts.description: Client charter, privacy policy statement, and significant terms and conditions for the digital service

artifacts.name: Third-Party Arrangements
artifacts.description: Details of outsourcing, website links, strategic alliances, or third-party partnerships related to the digital service

subsection: Introduction or enhancement to digital services
title: Simplified Notification for Enhancements
verbatim:
For any enhancements to existing digital services which meet the criteria in Appendix 6, a financial institution shall be subject to a simplified notification requirement and submit the following information in the notification to the Bank:
(a) description of the enhancements to the existing technologies; and
(b) risk assessment of the proposed enhancements, including the impact and measures to mitigate identified risks.
translation: For enhancements to existing digital services that meet the criteria in Appendix 6, a simplified notification process applies. You only need to submit a description of the enhancements and a risk assessment covering impact and mitigation measures.
evidence: Appendix 6 criteria assessment confirming simplified notification eligibility
Description of the proposed enhancements to existing digital services
Risk assessment of the proposed enhancements with impact analysis and mitigation measures
Simplified notification submission records to BNM

artifacts.name: Appendix 6 Eligibility Assessment
artifacts.description: Assessment confirming the enhancement meets Appendix 6 criteria for simplified notification

artifacts.name: Enhancement Description and Risk Assessment
artifacts.description: Description of digital service enhancements and risk assessment with impact and mitigation measures

artifacts.name: Simplified Notification Records
artifacts.description: Records of simplified notifications submitted to BNM for qualifying enhancements

subsection: Introduction or enhancement to digital services
title: Assurance and Confirmation for Material Enhancements
verbatim:
For any enhancements to existing digital services which are not subject to the simplified notification requirement under paragraph 16.3, a financial institution is required to undertake the following measures prior to notifying the Bank:
(a) engage an independent external party to provide assurance that the financial institution has addressed the technology risks and security controls associated with the digital services or any material enhancement to the digital services. The format of the assurance shall be as set out in Part A of Appendix 7; and
(b) provide a confirmation by the CISO, senior management officer or the chairman of the board or designated board-level committee specified in paragraph 8.3 of the financial institution's readiness to provide digital services or implement any material enhancement to the digital services. The format of the confirmation shall be as set out in Part B of Appendix 7.
translation: For digital service enhancements that do not qualify for simplified notification under 16.3, you must: (a) engage an independent external party to provide assurance that technology risks and security controls have been addressed, using the format in Part A of Appendix 7; and (b) obtain a confirmation from the CISO, senior management officer, or board/committee chairman of the institution's readiness, using the format in Part B of Appendix 7.
evidence: Independent external party assurance report (Appendix 7 Part A format)
CISO or senior management readiness confirmation (Appendix 7 Part B format)
Engagement letter or contract with the independent external party
Evidence that assurance and confirmation were completed prior to BNM notification

artifacts.name: Independent Assurance Report
artifacts.description: Assurance from an independent external party covering technology risks and security controls, in Appendix 7 Part A format

artifacts.name: CISO/Senior Management Readiness Confirmation
artifacts.description: Confirmation by CISO, senior management, or board committee chairman of readiness to provide or enhance digital services, in Appendix 7 Part B format

artifacts.name: External Party Engagement Records
artifacts.description: Engagement letter or contract with the independent external party providing assurance

subsection: Introduction or enhancement to digital services
title: Independent External Party Assurance Quality
verbatim: A financial institution must ensure that the independent external party providing the assurance is competent and has a good track record. The assurance shall address the matters covered in, and comply with, Part C and D of Appendix 7.
translation: The independent external party providing assurance must be competent and have a good track record. The assurance report must address and comply with the matters set out in Part C and Part D of Appendix 7.
evidence: Independent external party competency assessment and track record verification
Assurance report addressing Part C of Appendix 7
Assurance report addressing Part D of Appendix 7
Selection criteria and due diligence records for the independent external party

artifacts.name: External Party Competency Assessment
artifacts.description: Assessment verifying the competency and track record of the independent external party providing assurance

artifacts.name: Appendix 7 Part C and D Assurance Report
artifacts.description: Assurance report that addresses and complies with Part C and Part D of Appendix 7

artifacts.name: External Party Selection Records
artifacts.description: Due diligence and selection records for the independent external party

subsection: Introduction or enhancement to digital services
title: Provision of Documents for Bank Review
verbatim: A financial institution shall provide relevant documents for the Bank's review when required by the Bank.
translation: When BNM requests documents related to your digital services notification, you must provide them for the Bank's review.
evidence: Procedure for responding to BNM document requests
Records of documents provided to BNM upon request
Internal tracking of BNM document requests and responses
Document repository for digital services notification materials

artifacts.name: BNM Document Request Response Procedure
artifacts.description: Procedure for providing relevant documents to BNM when requested

artifacts.name: BNM Document Request Tracker
artifacts.description: Log tracking all BNM document requests, responses, and submission dates

artifacts.name: Submitted Document Records
artifacts.description: Copies of all documents submitted to BNM in response to review requests

subsection: Introduction or enhancement to digital services
title: Immediate Offering Upon Notification
verbatim: A financial institution may offer digital services or implement any enhancement to the digital services immediately upon submission of the notification under paragraph 16.1 and compliance with the requirements in paragraphs 16.2 to 16.6.
translation: You may launch or enhance digital services immediately once you have submitted the notification under paragraph 16.1 and complied with the requirements in paragraphs 16.2 through 16.6. No waiting period or approval from BNM is required.
evidence: Confirmation of notification submission to BNM under paragraph 16.1
Evidence of compliance with paragraphs 16.2 through 16.6
Records of digital service launch dates relative to notification submission dates
Internal sign-off confirming all notification requirements were met prior to launch

artifacts.name: Notification Submission Confirmation
artifacts.description: Confirmation that the notification was submitted to BNM under paragraph 16.1 prior to offering digital services

artifacts.name: Compliance Checklist (16.2-16.6)
artifacts.description: Checklist confirming compliance with all requirements in paragraphs 16.2 through 16.6 before digital service launch

artifacts.name: Digital Service Launch Records
artifacts.description: Records of digital service launch dates and corresponding notification submission dates
